headings.text: Secure Your Seat at Ironclad Summit 2025

paragraphs.text: Two days of systems engineering deep-dives, hands-on workshops, and a hardware expo at the David L. Lawrence Convention Center in Pittsburgh. Choose the pass that fits your team.
General admission rate after Early Bird closes.
Best value for engineering teams attending together.
Below are the key dates, refund terms, and group contact information. Reach out before purchasing if you need an invoice, a PO, or a visa support letter.

Full refunds available through September 1, 2025. Between September 2 and September 25, refunds are issued at 50%. After September 25, registrations are non-refundable but may be transferred to a colleague at no charge — just email us with the new attendee's details.

Registering 5 or more attendees? Need a purchase order, W-9, or custom invoice? Contact register@ironcladsummit.io and we'll get back to you within one business day. Educational and non-profit discounts are available on request.
Complete the form below to reserve your pass. You'll receive a confirmation email with payment instructions within minutes of submission.
Advancing resilient infrastructure design — one talk at a time.
October 9–10, 2025David L. Lawrence Convention CenterPittsburgh, PA
